caption: In a room with wood-paneled walls and brown blinds, a man wearing a blue button-down shirt stands behind a dark wooden podium, speaking to a small audience. He is positioned at the front of the room, while several people sit with their backs to the camera. The audience members include a person in a blue and red garment, a person in a maroon shirt, a person in a purple top, and a person in a yellow shirt. To the left, electronic equipment and speakers are visible. The white text "ORCA" appears as an overlay on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains at the podium, gesturing slightly as he speaks, and the audience members remain seated and attentive, with very little movement occurring between the frames.
